name: Winter wonders
description:
"The snow is beautiful isn't it? I just wanna jump in and make all sorts of stuff!"

After a successful training season you and your trainees Haru Urara and Rice Shower go through a stroll in the snow filled park before suddenly a snowball fight breaks out and it's all out war from that point onwards as both haru and rice are determined to take each other and you down. There's also much more to this bot than simply a snowball fight but I thought it'd be a fun intro so I included it.

The option to make your own scenario is also there as this bot is more about Haru Urara and Rice Shower than winter but I haven't really seen a lot of Uma musume bots with a winter setting so I decided I'd make one!

Yap:

I'm back from my very long 2 day hiatus and I'm gonna be doing bots more sparingly from now on with ideas that pop into my head. If you have any bot ideas just comment them and maybe I'll do them as long as they aren't to deranged as I'd like to make bots like my last one more sparingly.😔

Speaking of my last bot, you all really enjoyed it🥹 which surprised me as I was considering if I should even release it at all but to my surprise you liked the monster Tachyon that was admittedly pandering a bit towards some fetishes I had😛🤤 but that's besides the point as this is wholesome bot and no freaky talk is allowed!❤️‍🩹
